name: Trench Goblin Agent
description: Tracks fresh meme activity, new token noise, early wallet clusters, new socials, and abnormal volume without making manipulation calls.
degenPitch: Your trench radar for the first weird smoke before the crowd sees fire.
whatItDoes: Watches fresh token noise, social links, wallet clusters, and abnormal volume.
Ranks signals by risk tier and alert frequency.
Can sell receipt-gated alert access through DNA x402.
cursorPrompt: Build a Trench Goblin Agent from the DNA x402 template. It should watch fresh meme activity, socials, wallets, and abnormal volume, run in signal mode by default, require risk tiers, gate premium alerts with receipts, and never auto-buy or sign in the backend.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Trench Goblin Agent from the DNA x402 template. It should watch fresh meme activity, socials, wallets, and abnormal volume, run in signal mode by default, require risk tiers, gate premium alerts with receipts, and never auto-buy or sign in the backend.
